title: Beyond Mines: Resources
body:
[![](https://i.imgur.com/vA9xbFe.png)](beyondmines.net)

Beyond Mines: Resources is designed to enhance your Minecraft experience in Beyond Mines modpacks while staying fully compatible with Vanilla visuals. It introduces a range of subtle but impactful changes, perfect for players who want a fresh look without sacrificing the familiar feel of the game.

This Resourcepack was already present in BM: Exosphere (All Editions) and BM: Revelations II.

![](https://i.imgur.com/WRexoNJ.png)

Current features:
- **Dark GUI Buttons**: Enjoy a sleek, modern interface with darker GUI buttons, making menus easier on the eyes, especially in low-light environments.
- **Grass with Varying Heights**: Add more depth and realism to your landscapes with grass that comes in different heights. This feature is compatible with other texture-replacing resource packs, since the 3D model itself and not the texture got changed
- **Azalea /-Leaves Variety**: Spice up your gardens and forests with multiple variations of azalea plants and leaves, adding more diversity to your flora without compromising the Vanilla aesthetic.
- **Rounded Log Textures**: Logs now feature slightly rounded textures, giving trees a more natural, polished look while staying true to the original Minecraft style.
Improved Moss Carpet: The moss carpet is updated for a more natural look. It now hangs over the sides of the block it’s placed on, adding a cool, realistic touch to your builds.
- **Draconic Evolution**: Jappafied textures for some tools, blocks and materials
- **Rechiseled**: New chisel texture
- **Grappling Hook mod**: New texture for the Grappling Hook modifier block

Usage in other modpacks is permitted when using a resource pack loader, such as [Global Packs](https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks)
